proof_commands.name: check_node_policy
proof_commands.command: bash -lc NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 22.22.3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED_NODE_VERSION: nvm use 22.22.3 failed -- install Node 22 via: nvm install 22'; exit 1; }; "[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]/backend/.venv/bin/python" scripts/check_node_policy.py --root "[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]"

proof_commands.name: frontend_node_gate
proof_commands.command: bash -lc NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 22.22.3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCKED_NODE_VERSION: nvm use 22.22.3 failed -- install Node 22 via: nvm install 22'; exit 1; }; "[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]/backend/.venv/bin/python" scripts/check_frontend_node_gate.py --expected-major 22
